channel.title: GitHub Elixir Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Elixir in GitHub

item.title: phoenixframework/phoenix
item.description: Peace of mind from prototype to production

item.title: phoenixframework/phoenix_live_view
item.description: Rich, real-time user experiences with server-rendered HTML

item.title: plausible/analytics
item.description: Simple, open-source, lightweight (< 1 KB) and privacy-friendly web analytics alternative to Google Analytics.

item.title: elixir-lang/elixir
item.description: Elixir is a dynamic, functional language designed for building scalable and maintainable applications

item.title: elixir-ecto/ecto
item.description: A toolkit for data mapping and language integrated query.

item.title: sorentwo/oban
item.description: 💎 Robust job processing in Elixir, backed by modern PostgreSQL

item.title: blockscout/blockscout
item.description: Blockchain explorer for Ethereum based network and a tool for inspecting and analyzing EVM based blockchains.

item.title: elixir-nx/livebook
item.description: Interactive and collaborative code notebooks - made with Phoenix LiveView

item.title: phoenixframework/phoenix_view
item.description: Views and template rendering for Phoenix

item.title: phoenixframework/phoenix_live_dashboard
item.description: Realtime dashboard with metrics, request logging, plus storage, OS and VM insights

item.title: dashbitco/broadway
item.description: Concurrent and multi-stage data ingestion and data processing with Elixir

item.title: PSPDFKit-labs/bypass
item.description: Bypass provides a quick way to create a custom plug that can be put in place instead of an actual HTTP server to return prebaked responses to client requests.

item.title: akoutmos/prom_ex
item.description: An Elixir Prometheus metrics collection library built on top of Telemetry with accompanying Grafana dashboards

item.title: bitwalker/distillery
item.description: Simplify deployments in Elixir with OTP releases!

item.title: getsentry/sentry-elixir
item.description: The official Elixir SDK for Sentry (sentry.io)

item.title: elixir-grpc/grpc
item.description: An Elixir implementation of gRPC

item.title: surface-ui/surface
item.description: A server-side rendering component library for Phoenix

item.title: kafkaex/kafka_ex
item.description: Kafka client library for Elixir

item.title: access-company/antikythera
item.description: Elixir framework to build your own in-house PaaS

item.title: supabase/realtime
item.description: Listen to your to PostgreSQL database in realtime via websockets. Built with Elixir.

item.title: h4cc/awesome-elixir
item.description: A curated list of amazingly awesome Elixir and Erlang libraries, resources and shiny things. Updates:

item.title: elixir-plug/plug
item.description: A specification and conveniences for composable modules between web applications

item.title: opentelemetry-beam/opentelemetry_ecto
item.description: Trace Ecto queries with OpenTelemetry

item.title: rrrene/credo
item.description: A static code analysis tool for the Elixir language with a focus on code consistency and teaching.
